repeatedPatterns.title: Repeated Technology Patterns ({{count}})
repeatedPatterns.noPatternsFound: No repeated patterns found. This means each component has a unique technology stack combination.
repeatedPatterns.foundPatternsDescription: Found {{count}} repeated technology patterns across components
repeatedPatterns.description: These patterns represent technology stack combinations that appear in multiple components. High-frequency patterns indicate standardization opportunities and potential quick wins for modernization efforts.
repeatedPatterns.quickWinDescription: Patterns with high frequency (3+ components) represent the best opportunities for:
repeatedPatterns.uniqueTechStackMessage: Each component has a unique technology stack combination.
repeatedPatterns.tableDescription: Technology patterns that appear in multiple components
repeatedPatterns.quickWinOpportunityDescription: This pattern appears in {{frequency}} components across {{applications}} applications. Consider creating a standardized template or migration strategy for this technology stack.
repeatedPatterns.recommendation1: Create a reusable component template with this technology stack
repeatedPatterns.recommendation2: Develop standardized deployment and configuration scripts
repeatedPatterns.recommendation3: Establish common best practices and documentation
repeatedPatterns.recommendation4: Consider consolidating similar components where appropriate
repeatedPatterns.recommendation5: Use this pattern as a reference for modernizing other components
repeatedPatterns.noComponentsFound: No components found for this pattern

exportDataConfig.title: Export Data Configuration
exportDataConfig.datasetSizeDescription: Larger datasets provide more comprehensive testing but take longer to generate.
exportDataConfig.includeEdgeCases: Include Edge Cases (Unicode, long text, empty fields)

similaritiesAnalysis.analysisTimeout: Analysis is taking longer than expected. Please check back later.
similaritiesAnalysis.headerDescriptionApplications: Application similarity analysis compares your applications based on their technology stacks (runtimes, frameworks, databases, integrations, and storage). It identifies applications with similar technology combinations to help you group them for modernization planning, resource optimization, and standardization efforts.
similaritiesAnalysis.headerDescriptionComponents: Component similarity analysis compares your technology components based on their technical characteristics. It identifies components with similar technology stacks to help you discover reusable patterns, standardization opportunities, and potential consolidation candidates across your portfolio.
similaritiesAnalysis.descriptionApplications: Configure and run application similarity analysis to identify patterns and optimization opportunities
similaritiesAnalysis.descriptionComponents: Configure and run component similarity analysis to identify patterns and optimization opportunities
similaritiesAnalysis.analysisInProgress: Analysis in Progress. This may take several minutes (for large datasets).
similaritiesAnalysis.analysisTimeDescription: This may take a moment for large datasets
similaritiesAnalysis.clearResultsToRunNew: Clear Results to Run New Analysis
similaritiesAnalysis.advancedConfigDescription: Configure which technology categories to include in similarity calculations
similaritiesAnalysis.technologyCategoryDescription: Select which technology categories should be considered when calculating application similarities
similaritiesAnalysis.includeRuntimesDescription: Consider runtime environments in similarity calculation
similaritiesAnalysis.includeStoragesDescription: Consider storage technologies in similarity calculation
similaritiesAnalysis.tip1: Ensure the similarities analysis has been run for this project
similaritiesAnalysis.tip2: Check that you have the necessary permissions to access this project
similaritiesAnalysis.tip3: Verify your authentication token is valid
similaritiesAnalysis.tip4: Try refreshing the page if the issue persists
similaritiesAnalysis.noResultsMessage: No similarities analysis results found for this project. The analysis may not have been run yet or may still be in progress.
similaritiesAnalysis.step1: Run the similarities analysis using the "Run Similarities Analysis" button above
similaritiesAnalysis.step2: Wait for the analysis to complete (this may take several minutes)
similaritiesAnalysis.step3: Refresh this section once the analysis is finished
similaritiesAnalysis.thisCouldIndicate: This could indicate that each component has a unique technology stack combination, or there might be issues with the technology data.
similaritiesAnalysis.noComponentAnalysisResultsDescription: Start a component similarity analysis to see results here. The analysis uses distributed Step Functions processing to handle large datasets efficiently.
similaritiesAnalysis.title: Similarities Analysis Results
similaritiesAnalysis.networkDescription: This network diagram shows the relationships between applications based on their technology stack similarities. Node size represents the number of connections, and line thickness represents similarity strength.
similaritiesAnalysis.distributionDescription: This chart shows the distribution of similarity scores across all application pairs. Higher bars indicate more application pairs in that similarity range.
similaritiesAnalysis.noSimilarPairsMessage: No application pairs with significant similarity were found.

networkError.title: Network Connection Error
networkError.message: Unable to connect to the export service. This might be due to a temporary network issue.
networkError.suggestion3: Wait a moment and try again

authError.title: Authentication Error
authError.message: Your session may have expired or you may not have permission to perform this export.
authError.suggestion1: Try logging out and logging back in
authError.suggestion2: Contact your administrator if you need export permissions
authError.suggestion3: Refresh the page to renew your session

timeoutError.title: Request Timeout
timeoutError.message: The export request took too long to process. This can happen with large datasets.
timeoutError.suggestion1: Try selecting fewer categories to reduce export size
timeoutError.suggestion2: Wait a moment before trying again
timeoutError.suggestion3: Contact support if the problem persists

resizeError.title: Display Error
resizeError.message: A temporary display issue occurred. This is usually resolved by refreshing the page.
resizeError.suggestion2: Try using a different browser if the problem persists

permissionError.title: Permission Error
permissionError.message: You do not have permission to access some of the requested export data.
permissionError.suggestion1: Contact your administrator to request export permissions
permissionError.suggestion2: Try selecting different categories that you have access to
permissionError.suggestion3: Verify you are logged in with the correct account

quotaError.title: Export Limit Exceeded
quotaError.message: You have reached the maximum number of concurrent exports or export size limit.
quotaError.suggestion1: Wait for current exports to complete before starting new ones
quotaError.suggestion2: Try selecting fewer categories to reduce export size
quotaError.suggestion3: Contact support if you need higher limits

genericError.title: Export Error
genericError.message: An unexpected error occurred while processing your export request.
genericError.suggestion1: Try refreshing the page and attempting the export again
genericError.suggestion2: If the problem persists, contact support with the error details below

mockDataConfig.mockDisabledDescription: Mock data is currently disabled. The export system will attempt to use real API endpoints. Enable mock data for development and testing scenarios.

similaritySummary.summaryDescription: This summary provides an overview of application similarity across your portfolio. The estimated application count is derived from the total number of comparison pairs. Small clusters may indicate unique application stacks, while large clusters suggest standardization opportunities.

componentClusters.noClustersFound: No component clusters found. Try lowering the similarity threshold to find more clusters.
componentClusters.foundClustersDescription: Found {{count}} component clusters based on similarity analysis
componentClusters.clustersDescription: Components are grouped into clusters based on their technology stack similarities. Each cluster represents components that share similar technologies and could potentially be standardized or consolidated.
componentClusters.noClustersFoundDescription: No component clusters were identified with the current similarity threshold.
